scenario: A local OpenClaw gateway user can load the plugin and call loo_* tools to search, describe, expand, dry-run, inspect cockpit cards, and reason about operating attention from bounded summaries without raw transcript access.
expected_public_safe_evidence: describe and direct-session/query expand profile names
recent session and cockpit inbox card counts
operating-picture source coverage, source authority coverage, and not_configured P1 source states
gateway setupStatus, setupBlockers, and setupGuidance for first-run credential blockers
agent reasoning note based only on safe summaries
pass_criteria: The npm package includes an agent-facing skill/playbook for the canonical staged recall and dry-run workflows.
OpenClaw gateway can discover the plugin or the issue records why the gateway is unavailable.
Agent can search sessions through loo_* read tools and receive source-prefixed refs.
Agent can describe and expand selected refs within a bounded token profile.
Agent can list recent session cards and a deterministic cockpit inbox without a wildcard query.
Agent can inspect operating-picture cards whose claims cite source refs, confidence, freshness, reason codes, and authority coverage.
Missing P1 source adapters are reported as not_configured instead of summarized.
Unavailable or cache-only authorities degrade to unknown or low confidence instead of being treated as current truth.
Agent can dry-run a control action and reason about the audit id without sending a live action.
Evidence contains public-safe summaries, counts, refs, hashes, setupStatus classifications, and blocker codes only.
fail_criteria: Agent must read raw transcripts to answer the session-management question.
Gateway exposes live mutation without dry-run approval proof.
Evidence captures local DBs, transcript files, screenshots, prompt text, or secrets.
Tool output is too vague for the agent to choose a safe next action.
Operating-picture output hides missing sources, omits authority coverage, or treats PLAN_STATE prose as current truth.
known_gaps: Fresh OpenClaw profiles may need scoped gateway credentials or profile/device pairing before tool-smoke can call tools; `setupStatus.classification` must distinguish this from package failure.

P0 operating-picture tools use LCO/Codex, structured GitHub inputs, explicit PLAN_STATE pins, and a public source-authority profile only; Notion, support-control, Company Brain, Stripe, dashboard/export, and summarizer adapters remain P1.
This does not prove live Codex control, generic GUI mutation, Claude Code adapter parity, full business truth, or release-grade customer readiness.
next_action: Run #258 authority-coverage dogfood for the operating-picture tools, then continue P0 cockpit/operating-picture children before filing P1 adapter work.
proof_boundary: This proves local OpenClaw gateway agent usability for Codex read/search/describe/expand/detail lookup/recommend/dry-run and P0 cockpit/operating-picture cards using public-safe evidence only; it does not prove live control, GUI mutation, Claude Code adapter parity, full business truth, or 1.0 readiness.
